glosses.ja: 稲妻; フラッシュ（カメラ）

sentences.target: Der Blitz hat den Baum getroffen.

translations.de: Der Blitz hat den Baum getroffen.
translations.es: Un rayo cayó sobre el árbol.
translations.zh-Hans: 一道闪电击中了那棵树。
translations.nl: De bliksem sloeg in de boom.

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking nominative masculine singular; determines the subject noun 'Blitz'.
Common noun; subject in nominative singular; means 'lightning'.
Finite auxiliary verb (3rd person singular present) forming the perfect tense with the past participle 'getroffen'.
Definite article marking accusative masculine singular; determines the direct object 'Baum'.
Common noun; direct object in accusative singular.
Past participle of the lexical verb; main verb in perfect construction meaning 'to hit/strike'.

sentences.target: Ich mache den Blitz am Handy aus.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈmaxə deːn blɪts am ˈhɛndi aʊs/

translations.de: Ich mache den Blitz am Handy aus.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈmaxə deːn blɪts am ˈhɛndi aʊs/
translations.en: I'm turning off the flash on the phone.
translations.es: Estoy apagando el flash del teléfono.
translations.it: Sto spegnendo il flash del telefono.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把手机的闪光灯关掉。
translations.yue: 我喺手機度熄緊閃光燈。
translations.pt: Estou desligando o flash do telefone.
translations.vi: Tôi tắt đèn flash trên điện thoại.
translations.nl: Ik zet de flitser op mijn telefoon uit.
translations.hi: मैं फोन का फ्लैश बंद कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg slår av blitsen på telefonen.
translations.sv: Jag stänger av blixten på telefonen.
translations.da: Jeg slår blitzen fra på telefonen.
translations.ja: スマホのフラッシュをオフにしている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (1st person singular present); component of the separable verb 'ausmachen' meaning 'to switch off'; takes the accusative object 'den Blitz'.
Definite article marking accusative masculine singular; determines the direct object 'Blitz'.
Common noun; direct object in accusative singular; here used as 'camera/phone flash'.
Preposition 'an' contracted with the dative article 'dem' ('am'); heads a PP and selects dative ('Handy').
Common noun; dative singular complement of the preposition 'am'.
Separable verbal particle completing the verb 'ausmachen' with 'mache'; indicates switching off.

sentences.target: Er rennt heute wie der Blitz nach Hause.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ʁɛnt ˈhɔʏtə viː deːɐ̯ blɪts naːx ˈhaʊzə/

translations.de: Er rennt heute wie der Blitz nach Hause.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ʁɛnt ˈhɔʏtə viː deːɐ̯ blɪts naːx ˈhaʊzə/
translations.en: He is running home like lightning today.
translations.es: Hoy corre a casa como un rayo.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, il rentre chez lui comme l'éclair.
translations.it: Oggi corre a casa come un fulmine.
translations.ko: 오늘 그는 번개처럼 집으로 달려가고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 他今天像闪电一样往家跑。
translations.yue: 佢今日好似閃電噉跑返屋企。
translations.ru: Сегодня он бежит домой как молния.
translations.pt: Hoje ele corre para casa como um raio.
translations.he: היום הוא רץ הביתה כמו ברק.
translations.vi: Hôm nay anh ấy chạy về nhà nhanh như chớp.
translations.nl: Vandaag rent hij als de bliksem naar huis.
translations.uk: Сьогодні він біжить додому, як блискавка.
translations.hi: आज वह बिजली की तरह घर भाग रहा है.
translations.pl: Dziś biegnie do domu jak błyskawica.
translations.nb: I dag løper han hjem som lynet.
translations.id: Hari ini dia lari pulang secepat kilat.
translations.sv: Idag springer han hem som blixten.
translations.ro: Astăzi aleargă acasă ca un fulger.
translations.da: I dag løber han hjem som lynet.
translations.fi: Tänään hän juoksee kotiin kuin salama.
translations.ja: 今日は稲妻のように家に向かって走っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite intransitive verb (3rd person singular present).
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
Comparative/subordinating marker introducing the simile 'wie der Blitz'.
Definite article marking nominative masculine singular within the comparison phrase.
Common noun in nominative within the simile 'wie der Blitz' (meaning very fast).
Directional preposition selecting dative; heads the PP 'nach Hause'.
Common noun in dative singular in the fixed expression 'nach Hause' (destination).

sentences.target: Der Hund zittert beim ersten Blitz im Garten.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ hʊnt ˈtsɪtɐt baɪm ˈeːɐ̯stn blɪts ɪm ˈɡaʁtən/

translations.de: Der Hund zittert beim ersten Blitz im Garten.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ hʊnt ˈtsɪtɐt baɪm ˈeːɐ̯stn blɪts ɪm ˈɡaʁtən/
translations.en: The dog shakes at the first lightning flash in the yard.
translations.es: El perro tiembla con el primer relámpago en el patio.
translations.fr: Le chien tremble au premier éclair dans le jardin.
translations.it: Il cane trema al primo lampo in giardino.
translations.ko: 마당에서 첫 번개가 번쩍이자 개가 떨고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 院子里刚出现第一道闪电，狗就发抖。
translations.yue: 花園出現第一下閃電嗰陣，隻狗就震。
translations.ru: Собака дрожит при первой вспышке молнии во дворе.
translations.pt: O cachorro treme ao primeiro relâmpago no quintal.
translations.he: הכלב רועד עם הברק הראשון בחצר.
translations.vi: Con chó run khi tia chớp đầu tiên lóe lên ngoài sân.
translations.ar: الكلب يرتجف عند أول وميض برق في الفناء.
translations.nl: De hond trilt bij de eerste bliksemflits in de tuin.
translations.uk: Собака тремтить під час першого спалаху блискавки у дворі.
translations.hu: A kutya remeg az első villámnál az udvarban.
translations.hi: आँगन में पहली बिजली की चमक पर कुत्ता काँप रहा है.
translations.pl: Pies drży przy pierwszym błysku pioruna na podwórku.
translations.el: Ο σκύλος τρέμει με την πρώτη αστραπή στην αυλή.
translations.nb: Hunden skjelver ved første lynglimt i hagen.
translations.id: Anjing gemetar saat kilat pertama di halaman.
translations.sv: Hunden skakar vid första blixten i trädgården.
translations.ro: Câinele tremură la primul fulger în curte.
translations.cs: Pes se třese při prvním záblesku na dvoře.
translations.da: Hunden ryster ved det første lyn i haven.
translations.fi: Koira tärisee ensimmäisen salaman välähtäessä pihalla.
translations.ja: 庭で最初の稲光が走ると犬が震える。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking nominative masculine singular; determines the subject noun 'Hund'.
Common noun; subject in nominative singular.
Finite intransitive verb (3rd person singular present).
Preposition 'bei' contracted with the dative article 'dem' ('beim'); takes dative; heads PP modifying 'zittert'.
Attributive ordinal adjective; dative masculine singular agreeing with 'Blitz' under 'beim'.
Common noun; dative masculine singular complement of 'beim'; refers to the first lightning/flash.
Preposition 'in' contracted with the dative article 'dem' ('im'); takes dative; heads a locative PP.
Common noun; dative masculine singular complement of 'im'; denotes location.
